title: Role metrics
description: Schema for shared/role_metrics.csv. Rows expose baseline role-level emissions metrics for visualization and explanation without changing solver semantics.

baseline_year.description: Baseline year used for this metric row.

activity_value.description: Baseline activity value used to scale incumbent method emissions.

baseline_direct_gross_emissions_mtco2e.description: Positive direct baseline emissions in MtCO2e. Blank when unresolved.

baseline_direct_net_emissions_mtco2e.description: Net direct baseline emissions in MtCO2e including negative-removal entries. Blank when unresolved.

emissions_importance_band.description: Coarse emissions importance band for visualization.
